doctor.heading: Sign in to Acuity
doctor.support: Sign in to pick up your forms.
doctor.factorSupport: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
doctor.factorHint: Open Google Authenticator, 1Password, or Authy and enter the code for Acuity.
doctor.enrollSupport: Your clinic requires MFA. Scan the QR code, then enter the code to finish.
doctor.enrollScan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
doctor.backupCaption: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose your authenticator.
doctor.clinicSupport: You're linked to more than one clinic.
doctor.recoveryStarted: Recovery started. Check your email — we'll confirm a few details before setting up your new device.
doctor.landed: You're in. Taking you to your forms…
doctor.landedReturn: You're in. Taking you back to where you were…

states.wrongCredentials: Let's get you back in. That didn't match — check your details and try again, or use lost-device recovery below.
states.locked: Your account is paused for safety after several tries. Give it a few minutes, or reach your clinic admin to unlock it sooner. Nothing you've done is lost.
states.lostDevice: No problem — we'll help you set up a new device. This is a careful step, so we'll confirm a few things first.
states.sessionExpired: You've been away a while, so we signed you out to keep things safe. Sign in again and we'll take you right back to the form you were on.
states.permissionDenied: This sign-in is for the clinic app. If you're an Acuity operator, head to the operator console instead.
states.networkError: We can't reach Acuity right now. Check your connection and try again — nothing you've done is lost.
states.mfaFailed: That confirmation didn't go through. Try again with your passkey or device.
states.mfaExpired: That step took a little too long, so we've reset it to keep things safe. Start the confirmation again.
states.clinicSelectFailed: We couldn't set that clinic just now. Pick it again, or start over.
states.recoveryFailed: We couldn't start recovery just now. Try again in a moment — no changes were made.

operator.heading: Operator sign-in
operator.support: Sign in to the Acuity console with your security key.
operator.recoveryStarted: Recovery started. A super-admin will verify your identity before issuing a new key.
operator.landed: Signed in. Taking you to the Clinics portfolio…
operator.landedReturn: Signed in. Taking you back to where you were…

states.wrongCredentials: Let's get you back in. That didn't match — check your details and try again.
states.locked: This account is paused for safety after several tries. It'll clear shortly, or a super-admin can lift it sooner. Nothing's lost.
states.lostKey: We'll help you recover access. Replacing a security key is a careful, verified step — we'll walk you through it.
states.sessionExpired: You've been signed out to keep the console secure. Sign in again with your key to continue.
states.permissionDenied: This is the operator console. A clinic-app sign-in won't work here — use your operator account and security key.
states.networkError: We can't reach the console right now. Check your connection and try again.
states.mfaFailed: Your key wasn't recognised. Remove it, then insert and touch it again.
states.mfaExpired: That step took too long, so it was reset to keep the console secure. Start the key check again.
states.recoveryFailed: We couldn't start recovery just now. Try again in a moment, or reach a super-admin.
